features: Axe Gold Temptation Deodorant Spray without Aluminium Salts, 150 ml
Fascinated with luxurious elegance and cool sophistication; AXE Gold Temptation - as seductive as gold
description: Product Description There are things in the world that have an indestructible signal effect and attraction. Gold, for example. Symbol of wealth, love, independence. Gold has always been an object of desire. Even in today's times, it has not lost any of its value and desirability. For men who know exactly what they want, this Axe deodorant spray has been created with its luxurious fragrance. It combines the efficient AXE protection against body odour with a sophisticated fragrance, developed by the best fragrance experts in the world. Completely without aluminium salts, AXE Gold Temptation protects its carrier so effectively that it can rely on its sovereign and safe radiance at all times. The fragrance is elegantly composed and impresses with its versatile, yet always clear character. Male sovereign in the base notes - musk, vanilla, amber and chocolate - it exudes sophistication in the heart with notes of exotic spices. The citrus fresh top notes with pear, bergamot and basil provide lightness and esprit. Together it creates an elegant composition that stimulates the senses while protecting it safely and completely free from aluminium from unpleasant odours. Simply spray the Axe body spray on the free upper body, done. Axe Gold Temptation is the effective deodorant with a fragrance that tells of a sophisticated personality that knows exactly what she wants. Ingredients Alcohol denat., butane, isobutane, propane, perfume, alpha-isomethyl ionone, citral, coumarin, geraniol, limonene, linalool Directions Spray the Axe body spray on the free upper body.
